session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan #8559 implementation complete. Here's a summary:
## Changes Made
### 1. `src/erk/tui/commands/types.py` - Added `launch_key: str | None` field to `CommandDefinition` between `shortcut` and `is_available`
### 2. `src/erk/tui/commands/registry.py` - Added `launch_key` to all 27 command definitions - ACTION commands got their key letter: close_plan=c, dispatch=d, land=l, rebase=f, address=a, **rewrite=w** (new), **cmux_sync=m** (new), close_objective=c, one_shot_plan=s, check_objective=k - All OPEN and COPY commands got `launch_key=None`
### 3. `src/erk/tui/screens/launch_screen.py` - Removed the `LAUNCH_KEYS` dict entirely - Changed the init loop from `LAUNCH_KEYS.get(cmd.id)` to `cmd.launch_key`
### 4. `tests/tui/screens/test_launch_screen.py` - Removed `LAUNCH_KEYS` import - Rewrote 3 tests to verify `launch_key` from the registry instead of the removed dict - Added "w" (rewrite_remote) assertions to plan view key mapping tests
### 5. `tests/tui/commands/test_registry.py` - Added `test_launch_key_no_conflicts_within_view_mode` — verifies no duplicate launch_keys per view - Added `test_launch_key_only_on_action_commands` — verifies only ACTION commands have launch_key set
**PR**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8559
